title: Compound instruction with explicit ordering; SPEAK must engage the meta-step
failure_mode: keywords 'begin'/'done' short-circuit to a verdict on the story body; classifier skips the 'figure out an order first' meta-instruction (FR-018)
invariant: a compound instruction admits SPEAK engaging the meta-step (choose an order) first, not the story body
rationale: The operator orders the steps explicitly: pick an order, do not begin the story until decided, then write, and only count it done when saved to disk. The honest verdict is SPEAK on the ordering meta-step.
